since_last: 69% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.63%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -2.24% · Gold -1.71% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 69% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.63%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.63%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -19.87%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.81%, MRVL +5.87%, LRCX +5.53%, TER +5.13%, KLAC +5.09%. Laggards: SPCX -19.87%, IBM -3.30%, SAP -1.45%, WDAY -1.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -19.87% at $153.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -19.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
